title: Mana Trashcan
description:
Ever had too much of Botanias magical mana resource, and didn't know what to do?

Don't worry, we have the solution! A trashcan that accepts and instantly voids all the mana you can throw at it.
body:
Ever had too much of Botanias magical mana resource, and didn't know what to do?

Don't worry, we have the solution! A trashcan that accepts and instantly voids all the mana you can throw at it.

And the trashcan doesn't even charge a handling fee (and even if it would, there wouldn't be a real cost to it, as the mana is gone anyway, right?)

 

Please not that this mod is still not finished graphics wise and being able to see through the ground beneath the trashcan is a known issue.

How to use? Point spreaders at the trashcan or send some mana with sparks, and watch ALL THE MANA flow to the void.

**For Modpack Creators**:

You may include and redistribute this mod **as part of your modpack** when included via reference. You may ***not*** redistribute, host, or make available the mod by itself. If you are unsure, feel free to contact me.


If there is a specific platform you would like to see this hosted at, please contact me.


Currently this Mod is published on CurseForge and Modrinth.
